results.title: Leyla Aliyeva meets women engaged in mat weaving in Masally

results.title: Tartu scientists map how genes affect metabolism
results.description: Researchers at the University of Tartu have mapped how genes influence human metabolism using data from more than half a million people. The large-scale study gives scientists a more precise picture of the causes of disease and could help speed up drug development.
